[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010001 2
1 0011101 4
2 0101001 3
3 1000010 2
4 0000010 1
5 0000110 2
6 0111001 4
7 0110001 3

70 0000000 a
